text:
Created attachment 245446
Multiport patch redirecting BUILD_DEPENDS to sysutils/xxd

Attaching a multiport patch that fixes the issue for all 13 ports stuck in xxd:editors/vim BUILD_DEPENDS:

security/transcrypt
biology/metaeuk
www/netsurf
audio/mamba
audio/xuidesigner
audio/fluida-lv2
audio/spectacle-lv2
graphics/geeqie
graphics/glvis
sysutils/amtc
sysutils/ttyd
science/openkim-models
science/kim-api
